subject: Fermi GBM trigger 466316973/151012187 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (INFN Bari) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 466316973/151012187
at 04:29:29.04 UT on 12 October 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to particle activity."
